name: symgraph
description: Semantic code intelligence - build knowledge graphs of codebases for AI-assisted exploration
long_description:
Code Map uses tree-sitter to parse source code and build a knowledge graph of symbols and their relationships. It provides MCP tools for searching symbols, finding callers/callees, analyzing change impact, and building focused context for AI tasks.

Supported languages: Rust, TypeScript, JavaScript, Python, Go, Java, C, C++

tools.name: symgraph-context
tools.description: Build focused code context for a specific task. Returns entry points, related symbols, and code snippets.

tools.name: symgraph-search
tools.description: Quick symbol search by name. Returns locations only (no code).

tools.name: symgraph-callers
tools.description: Find all functions/methods that call a specific symbol.

tools.name: symgraph-callees
tools.description: Find all functions/methods that a specific symbol calls.

tools.name: symgraph-impact
tools.description: Analyze the impact of changing a symbol. Breaks inbound coupling down by edge kind (method-call/contract, field-read/model, field-write/intrusive), counts inbound modules, and (with churn=true) annotates volatility. Supports format='json'.

tools.name: symgraph-definition
tools.description: Get the full source code of a symbol with surrounding context lines.

tools.name: symgraph-file
tools.description: List all symbols defined in a specific file.

tools.name: symgraph-references
tools.description: Find all references to a symbol including calls, imports, type usages, and other relationships.

tools.name: symgraph-node
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific code symbol.

tools.name: symgraph-status
tools.description: Get the status of the symgraph index. Shows statistics about indexed files, symbols, and relationships.

tools.name: symgraph-hierarchy
tools.description: Get the parent/child contains hierarchy of a symbol (e.g., class contains methods).

tools.name: symgraph-path
tools.description: Find call paths from one symbol to another.

tools.name: symgraph-unused
tools.description: Find unused symbols with no incoming references (dead code).

tools.name: symgraph-implementations
tools.description: Find all classes/structs that implement an interface or extend a trait/class.

tools.name: symgraph-diff-impact
tools.description: Analyze the impact of changing a specific region of code or a git diff.

tools.name: symgraph-blame
tools.description: Run git blame over the lines of a symbol's definition.

tools.name: symgraph-churn
tools.description: Show file change frequency (churn) over a recent window — the volatility dimension.

tools.name: symgraph-module-graph
tools.description: Aggregate the graph to a file/dir/module boundary: dependency adjacency, fan-in/fan-out, and cycles (SCCs). Supports format='json'.

tools.name: symgraph-coupling-score
tools.description: Rank module-pair coupling on strength × distance × volatility (churn). Produces the hotspots table. Supports format='json'.

tools.name: symgraph-god-struct
tools.description: Rank structs/classes by pub-field count × inbound-reference count × churn — the architectural-debt entry point. Supports format='json'.

tools.name: symgraph-dispatch-sites
tools.description: Find every file that dispatches on a member of the given enum (control coupling). Supports format='json'.

tools.name: symgraph-reindex
tools.description: Trigger incremental reindexing of the codebase. Runs in background.

user_config.name: Project Root
user_config.description: Path to the project directory to index
